form.formComment: Was at long odds at debut, got back early 4th of 8 at Fairgrounds Turf on March 15 over 1106m, 10 len behind One More Guitar carrying 52kg at $48.70. Encouraging signs on debut but this looks a tough assignment.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 53-day let-up. First-up after six months 4th of 11 at Gulfstream Park Turf on February 22 over 1609m, 2.75 len behind Icona carrying 56kg at $8.80. form.formComment: Filly back from a spell of seven months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation sixth of 12 at Kentucky September 10 over 1308m, 7 len behind Dashin' Diva carrying 55kg at $9.02. Previously first up; third of 12 at Churchill Downs Turf May 15 over 1006m, 0.8 len behind Something Stronger carrying 53.5kg at $42.96. Sure to be ready to run well.
